calendar.matters:
Petition For Termination Of Proceedings And Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar May-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition To Terminate Estate Administration For Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Strain for Garbo Lee.

Mr. Strain stated that he has the petition to terminate estate administration ready to be filed today. Mr. Strain was directed to bring back an endorsed copy of the petition to the Clerk at which time the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition To Terminate Estate Administration For Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar Mar-18-2014 Continued To Apr-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition To Terminate Estate Administration For Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar Jan-14-2014 Continued To Mar-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Steven Strain for Garbo Lee (Administrator).

Mr. Strain reported that he has attempted to file a Petition to Terminate Estate and for Discharge of Administrator and the petition was rejected twice. After looking at the petition and checking with the Examiner, the Court instructed Mr. Strain to file the petition and have it set for hearing. The Status was continued to March 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. Not Reported.

Petition By Purchaser For Specific Performance For Sale Of Real Property Under Buy/Sell Provisions Of A Partnership Agreement
Off Calendar Jan-14-2014 Off Calendar

Petition By Purchaser For Specific Performance For Sale Of Real Property Under Buy/Sell Provisions Of A Partnership Agreement
Off Calendar Nov-19-2013 Continued To Jan-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Doherty for and with Grace Yuen and Ignatius Tsang. Steven Strain for and with Garbo Lee.

Mr. Strain stated that upon reviewing papers they realized that the property is in the Trust of Karen Quan, that the only asset in the Estate is the partnership interest and that the probate matter needs to go away. Mr. Doherty asked the Court to proceed with the Estate. The Court informed Counsel that it could not make an order in an Estate on a Trust property. The Parties stepped out of the courtroom to discuss the matter. Upon returning, Mr. Doherty stated that he will dismiss his petition without prejudice to bringing the matter back as a Trust petition. Status on filing of a petition to terminate estate administration for lack of assets was set for January 14, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Specific Performance for Sale of Real Property Under Buy/Sell Provisions of a Partnership Agreement was also continued to January 14, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on filing of the dismissal.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
